questions: How do multivariate tests work in Optimizely?
What are best practices to design MVT in Optimizely?
qa.answer: Optimizely MVT tests variations across multiple sections simultaneously to discover the best combination. Best practices include limiting factors, ensuring adequate traffic, and predefining success metrics and duration.
implication: Limit the number of factors/levels to keep power achievable.
Use Optimizely’s calculators for duration and traffic needs.
Deploy winners to production and archive learnings for templates.
